description: Adapt lattice sieving from computational number theory (NFS for integer factoring) to enumerate SDS. The autocorrelation conditions define a lattice in Z^{4x167}. LLL/BKZ reduction plus CVP finds candidate 0/1 vectors corresponding to valid SDS blocks.
mathematical_formalization: Autocorrelation lattice L in Z^{668}: constraints forall g!=0, sum_i N_{supp(x_i)}(g) = lambda. LLL reduce, CVP to nearest 0/1 vector.
analogical_connections: Lattice sieving for SDS ~ NFS smooth value sieving
implementation_hypothesis: Transform autocorrelation conditions to linear system. Build lattice. BKZ-2.0 reduction. Schnorr-Euchner enumeration for nearest 0/1 vectors.
experiment_seed: Build lattice for v=23 (known SDS). Apply LLL, find 0/1 vectors. Verify known solutions. Scale to v=47, then v=167.
